creator: nork@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 256424
mail/flowersong-openarc v2025-01-05

I reviewed your patch which has many problems.  So I fixed your patch, please review your environment.

portlint/portfmt/portclippy/poudriere happy, please use following check tools:
  * ports-mgmt/portlint (portlint)
  * ports-mgmt/portfmt (portfmt, portclippy)
  * ports-mgmt/poudriere (poudriere)

I fixed following parts of Makefile:
- KEY=[space]VALUE to KEY=[tab]VALUE
- Sort some KEYs
- Use shebangfix, openarc required python (runtime)
- No longer use GNU_CONFIGURE_MANPREFIX
  https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=277603

I fixed following parts of files/openarc.in:
- /usr/local to %%PREFIX%%
- Fix indent of chgrp's line.

I fixed following parts of files/patch-*:
- make makepatch when you make patches

I fixed following parts of pkg-descr:
- remove last space in lines

I fixed following parts of pkg-plist:
- share/doc/openarc to %%DOCSDIR%%
- Reorder by my favalit, so you can ignore my change
- Add missing a manual, openarc-keygen.1.gz

I can't find many files in share/docs/openarc.  How about do you think?
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)

===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
